title: Legacy Vision
body:
![title](https://i.imgur.com/uYsdsiN.png)

****

Resource pack that replaces some textures to the old ones from Legacy Minecraft versions. **Changes are done in sounds, blocks, items, entities, guis, panorama, font**

****

FOR BETTER EXPERIENCE ✅

 Use Legacy4J Mod [https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j)
 
 Use Programmer's Art resource pack (recommended)

****

![Panorama](https://i.imgur.com/xikGFWI.png)

![TU0 Village](https://i.imgur.com/gOI9xrm.png)

![TU0 Castle](https://i.imgur.com/CVkapB1.png)

![Chest](https://i.imgur.com/lux1SQC.png)

### **I used other people's textures as a reference and in general in the pack.**
**Credits to**
- _PekitP_
- _LeMemeory_
- _Cubeoidal_
- _FredMSJD_
- _Enchanted_Games_
- careeoki
